title: [MTR4] StarTrain B715
description: Adds the B715, a fictional tram, to Minecraft. This is an early 2K downloads "thanks" gift!
body:
The StarTrain B715 is a low-floor boarding, single-car light rail train. They were built in 2018 and 75 trains entered service into San Marvin in 2019 and replaced some of the StarTrain B400s.

Requires Minecraft Transit Railway version 4.0.4 or higher in order for it to work properly!

i forgot to add bogies to this train lol
